testcase.name: test_change_email_valid_new_email
testcase.failure: tests/test_email_change.py:87: in test_change_email_valid_new_email assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429: {"detail":"Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_email_change_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_email_change.py:181: in test_full_email_change_flow assert response.status_code == 200, f"Email change request failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Email change request failed: {"detail":"Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
